PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRIGGS, AMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SF GREEN CAB LLC $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,000.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, DATED JUN-06-2012

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT SF GREEN CAB LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF TO FILE ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR PER THE REQUEST OF THE MOVING PARTY. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077.
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-18-2012 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
